title: ai_prep_search (Beta)
body: `ai_prep_search` is now available in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). This SQL function transforms the structured output of `ai_parse_document` into search-ready chunks optimized for vector search and RAG pipelines. See [`ai_prep_search` function](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/ai_prep_search).
